_comment: qwen-code settings for vllm-mlx on Mac Studio. vllm-mlx is single-model — set the baseUrl only when mlx-community/Ling-2.6-flash-mlx-6bit is the loaded model (otherwise update id + model.name to match the live /v1/models). Ling needs PR #1227 vendor + 2 patches; see docs/models/per-model/model-summary-ling.md. vllm-mlx does not require auth; envKey resolves to not-needed. Install target: ~/.qwen/settings.json.

openai.name: Ling-2.6-flash 6bit (Mac Studio, vllm-mlx)
openai.description: InclusionAI bailing_hybrid 104B/7.4B-active sparse MoE (4 MLA + 28 linear-attn layers, 256 experts), 6-bit MLX uniform quant — served via vllm-mlx as primary. Hermes tool format, no thinking.
